entry.title: [BHS][Infrastructure] - Electrical Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 18, 16:30 - 22:30 UTC

May 5, 15:17 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Electrical Infrastructure in BHS.

Start time : 18/06/2026 16:30 UTC
End time : 18/06/2026 22:30 UTC
Service impact : None
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in DC.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW1][Infrastructure] - Room W106 Electrical Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 18, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

May 12, 15:32 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Electrical Infrastructure in the Room W106.

Start time : 18/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 18/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified racks listed below may experience temporary IPMI unavailability during the operation, for a period of five minutes per rack.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in Room W106.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [PAR][Network] - Backbone maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 17, 19:00 UTC  -  Jun 18, 04:00 UTC

May 6, 19:52 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 17/06/2026 19:00 UTC
End time : 18/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers may experience latency during maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, our teams will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW1][Infrastructure] - Rows WAW0118A/WAW0118B Electrical Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 10, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

May 7, 15:06 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Infrastructure in rows WAW0118A/WAW0118B.

Start time : 10/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : A brief loss of IPMI connectivity may occur. Customers could experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case of their servers.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in WAW1.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [SBG5][Infrastructure] - Rack SBG0504A06C Electrical Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 27, 06:00 - 15:00 UTC

May 5, 13:08 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Electrical Infrastructure in rack SBG0504A06C.

Start time : 27/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in rack SBG0504A06C.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW1][Cooling System] - Rack WAW0106A05B Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 20, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

May 5, 12:55 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in WAW0106A05B.

Start time : 20/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 20/05/2026 14:00 UTC

Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
